nodes.label: kalkulator-kalkmate-prototyp-widok-ogolny.png
nodes.description: Marketing/gallery photo showing the KalkMate prototype calculator in a real-world study scenario. The scene depicts a wooden library/study table with the black KalkMate calculator prototype placed prominently in the foreground next to an open notebook filled with handwritten notes. A stack of physics textbooks (with 'PHYSICS' visible on a spine) sits to the left, reinforcing the educational/exam-preparation context. In the background, a student is seated at the same table working, with tall bookshelves, arched windows, and a classic library interior providing ambiance. The image serves as lifestyle/context photography for the KalkMate product website gallery, illustrating the intended use case: a Polish high-school student using the AI-assisted calculator for matura exam preparation (mathematics, physics, chemistry, biology). Aspect ratio is wide/landscape, with warm natural lighting suggesting daytime study session.
